overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character walking through a sunny ancient Mediterranean harbor marketplace. The character moves from a covered textile stall area through open dirt paths lined with vendors, eventually reaching a wooden dock overlooking the sea with sailing ships.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered textile market with fabric stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market stalls displaying purple and colorful textiles

entered.detail: market stall with stacked purple fabric rolls and textiles
orange fabric canopy providing shade over market walkway
wooden shelves holding various market goods and fabrics
blue and purple textiles hanging on lines between stalls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered marketplace with wooden plank flooring, passing stalls laden with purple fabrics and textiles. Orange canopies provide partial shade while colorful cloth hangs overhead between wooden shelving units.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront dirt path with coastal views

events.description: exits covered wooden market area onto open dirt path along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt coastal path passing villagers and market carts

notable_agents.action: villager in simple robes walking along the path

entered.detail: dirt path with wagon wheel tracks running along the coast
large wooden cart with stacked goods parked near the path
open view of the blue sea and distant coastline
green leafy tree providing shade near the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character leaves the covered market, emerging onto a sunlit dirt path along the waterfront. A large wooden cart sits to the left while the blue sea becomes visible ahead, with villagers walking along the coastal route.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market street with butcher stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the busier market area passing meat vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: butcher working at a meat stall with hanging carcasses

entered.detail: market stall with hanging meat carcasses and butchering tables
rocky cliff face with buildings built into the hillside
stall displaying large clay amphorae and pottery vessels

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more crowded market section with butcher stalls displaying hanging meat carcasses on the right. Pottery urns and amphorae are visible on left-side stalls, while stone buildings climb the cliff face in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with moored sailing vessels

events.description: character stops to examine pottery goods on wooden shelves
character resumes walking toward the end of the wooden dock

agents.ego_description: stops to inspect pottery on display shelves, then walks to the dock edge overlooking the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the harbor dock extending over water
ancient trireme sailing ship with square sail moored at the dock
wooden shelving unit displaying clay pots and amphorae
thick coiled ropes lying on the dock for mooring ships

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden dock extending over the water, where an ancient trireme is moored. The character pauses to examine pottery displayed on shelves, then continues to the dock edge overlooking the sea and distant coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded interior of a textile market out toward a bright, open harbor. It begins beneath orange canopies on wooden plank flooring, passing stalls draped in purple fabrics and colorful textiles. As the character leaves the covered area, the scene opens onto a sunlit dirt path where a large wooden cart sits beside a view of the blue sea and strolling villagers. The camera then moves through a crowded waterfront section lined with butcher stalls and pottery urns, with stone buildings climbing the distant cliff face. Finally, the path leads onto a wooden dock where an ancient trireme is moored, ending at the water's edge overlooking the sea and a far-off coastline.
